channel.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Sep 9th, 2020
item.description:
Notepads and Notebooks

  • WriteXO - Online Notepad with rich-text support, password protection and custom URLs.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Sep 7th, 2020
item.description:
Graphics, Image and Design

  • CleanIcons - Download Font Awesome icon fonts as PNG's.

    • Utilities (uncategorized)

  • Randommer - Random data generator and validator.

    • Communication

  • A2fax - Send free faxes online. No ads on cover pages. Add your own logo to cover page.

    • Audio and Video

  • AI Vocal Remover - Separate voice from music by artificial intelligence.
  • Ambient Mixer - Listen to free audio atmospheres (e.g. Scottish Rain/Slytherin Common Room) or mix your own ambient sound online.

    • Games

  • skribbl.io - Several players connect to a lobby and one of them is given a word that they need to draw without saying what it is while the others have to identify it.
  • surviv.io - Surviv.io is a 2D battle royale game. You only have one live per game, no respawn.
  • nitrome - Collection of free pixelart games. New games doesn't require flash.

    • Study and Education

  • Directed Grap Editor (CS Academy) - Draw directed graph systems with and without edge values and physics.

    • Drawing

  • Piskel - Free online editor for animated sprites & pixel art
  • JSPaint - A replica of 1990's MS Paint in the browser. Open source.

    • Internet Downloaders

  • dOnline - Download from YouTube, Instagram, Vimeo, SoundCloud, Facebook downloader.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Mar 4th, 2020
item.description:
Communication

  • Whereby - Video conference online. Create any room like whereby.com/some-room and starting chatting.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Nov 7th, 2019
item.description:
Text based tools

  • Emojify - A tool to spice up text, lyrics, or poems by adding emojis.

    • Some pointers

  • Most of the apps mentioned here do provide some kind of a user account feature to save history and progress. But as already stated before, a user account is not necessary to use the main features of these apps.

    • Privacy, Security and Cryptography

  • BugMeNot - A platform for finding and sharing logins of different websites. It helps you find credentials for signing in into different websites.

    • Programming Editors and IDEs

  • TutorialsPoint Online Tools - Online terminals for Ipython, Octave, Powershell, Redis and lots others. Also has a good collection of IDEs for programming languages.
  • DartPad -DartPad is an open-source tool that lets you play with the Dart language in any modern browser.

    • Search Engines

  • icon8 - Designers, download the design stuff for free — icons, photos, UX illustrations, and music for your videos.

    • Study and Education

  • WolframAlpha - Powerful computational knowledge engine. See plotting graphs examples for help on how to plot graphs.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Oct 19th, 2019
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • Morsify - Online Morse code translator.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Oct 13th, 2019
item.description:
Games

  • agar.io - The goal is to gain as much mass as possible by eating agar and cells smaller than the player's cell while avoiding larger ones which can eat the player's cells.
  • paper-io - The objective of the game is to control 100% of the arena. You play as a small, ever moving square with a small starting territory that corresponds to your square's color.
  • diep.io - Diepio is a game where you play as tanks and shoot things. Shoot shapes to upgrade your tank, then shoot players for lots of points.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Oct 12th, 2019
item.description:
Programming Editors and IDEs

  • JS Bin - Collaborative web development and debugging tool.

    • Utilities (uncategorized)

  • Dataflow kit - Extract structured data from Web pages.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Oct 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Graphics, Image and Design

  • doka.photo - Easy to use photo editor. You can crop, rotate, flip, add a filter, resize and annotate.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Apr 25th, 2019
item.description:
Graphics, Image and Design

  • LeanLogoMaker - Generate 100s of logos, pick your favourite and download. Includes covers and profile images for your social media sites.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Mar 24th, 2019
item.description:
File Hosting/Sharing

  • Firefox Send - Mozilla's free fileshare program. Up to 1gb without account, 2.5gb with account.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Dec 21st, 2018
item.description:
Markdown

  • HackMD - A collaborative, powerful, real-time online markdown editor with preview.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Dec 15th, 2018
item.description:
Graphics, Image and Design

  • PhotoPea - Image editor that looks like Photoshop and has most of its features.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Oct 20th, 2018
item.description:
Programming Tools

  • ObjGen - This app helps you generate code (JSON, HTML, etc) in real time as you type in only the key words, types and properties using a text based syntax.
  • JsonFormatter - View json in human readable form.

    • Utilities (uncategorized)

  • Mailinator - Disposable email service.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Jul 26th, 2018
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • Edubirdie - An online plagiarism checker which gives percentage of similarity comparing our content with online resources.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Jul 25th, 2018
item.description:
Programming Editors and IDEs

  • PythonTutor - Visualize Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Ruby, C, and C++ code execution in your Web browser.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Jul 20th, 2018
item.description:
Search Engines

  • Flaticon - Largest search engine for free icons.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Jul 17th, 2018
item.description:
Drawing

  • Sketchpad - Create digital artwork and export to popular image formats JPEG, PNG, SVG, and PDF.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 10th, 2018
item.description:
Text based tools

  • Write.as - Cross-platform writing and publishing tool that supports Markdown and editing / deleting past posts.

    • Programming Tools

  • jsonstore.io - jsonstore.io offers free, secured JSON based API endpoints for small projects. It supports common types of HTTP operations like POST, GET, PUT, DELETE etc.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 3rd, 2018
item.description:
Markdown

  • StackEdit.io - Rich in-browser markdown editor that works offline.

    • Utilities (uncategorized)

  • Daily Todo - Simple todo list maker.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Feb 6th, 2018
item.description:
Drawing

  • Witeboard - A real-time whiteboard for your team. No signups required.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Feb 4th, 2018
item.description:
Programming Tools

  • Carbon - Create and share beautiful images of your source code.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Jan 27th, 2018
item.description:
Text based tools

  • DiffNow - Advanced, online and free File Difference checking, with options like Upload file, compare files by their links or Text Input.

    • Programming Tools

  • pForm - Create HTML forms through a simple WYSIWYG GUI and download the corresponding code.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Jan 25th, 2018
item.description:
Programming Tools

  • CSS Matic - CSS tools to quickly generate gradients, border radius, noise textures and box shadow and get corresponding CSS or SASS.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Jan 20th, 2018
item.description:
Text based tools

  • Telegraph - Minimalist publishing tool that supports richly formatted text.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Dec 18th, 2017
item.description:
Music, Radio and Podcasts

  • Radio Garden - Listen to thousands of radio stations worldwide by selecting a city on the globe.

    • Notepads and Notebooks

  • Taskade - Collaborative notes, task lists, and outlines. Sign up is optional.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Oct 28th, 2017
item.description:
Games

  • CrossCode - A retro-inspired 2D game set in the distant future. Comes with great game mechanics such as combos, puzzles, skill trees, quests, items and more.
  • Miniclip - Collection of a variety of free games that can be played without giving your email. Flash required.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Oct 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Utilities (uncategorized)

  • Resume Nation - An open source resume builder progressive web app which can work offline. It has a few themes to choose from and it can export the resume in PDF form.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Oct 12th, 2017
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • AlarmDJ - Online Alarm clock, use MP3 files and YouTube videos as alarm.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Oct 6th, 2017
item.description:
Business and Finance

  • ICOStats.com - Track & compare performance of ICOs. Displays detailed stats like ROI since ICO, ROI vs ETH since ICO, and charts for comparing the historical performance of ICOs.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Sep 25th, 2017
item.description:
Graphics, Image and Design

  • Flaming Text - An online logo or name generator/creator, modify your logo according to your wish and get in many formats including PNG and JPEG.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Sep 5th, 2017
item.description:
Music, Radio and Podcasts

  • Anime Openings - Free anime radio, listen or download anime opening and ending videos.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Aug 29th, 2017
item.description:
Music, Radio and Podcasts

  • ongaku - Online anime music radio, with desktop portstars20.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Aug 5th, 2017
item.description:
Others

  • WriteURL - A collaborative real-time online text editor.

    • Internet Downloaders

  • ZbigZ - Torrent downloader that lets you chose the files to download from a torrent. File size limit is 2gb and download is capped to 50kbps in the free version.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Jul 28th, 2017
item.description:
Programming Tools

  • CSS Autoprefixer - A postprocessor for handling vendor prefixes in CSS. Just paste the regular CSS and get the vendor prefix handled CSS instantly.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Jul 25th, 2017
item.description:
Audio and Video

  • Filelab Audio Editor - Audio editor with basic features like trim, merge, cut audio.
  • YOU.DJ - Online music mixer, DJ software sourcing music from SoundCloud.

    • Drawing

  • ScribbleMaps - Create custom google maps.

    • Graphics, Image and Design

  • Online Logo Maker - Make logos online. Extra user account feature to save creations.
  • ezGIF - GIF images editor (cropping, scaling, optimizing and more).
  • IcoMoon - A platform that helps you in finding vector icon packs, hosting icons as SVGs or fonts and to generate SVG + PNG + icon fonts of selected icons.

    • Internet Downloaders

  • Bitport [Account] - Torrent downloader. Limited to 1 torrent of 1gb per day in free account.

    • Music, Radio and Podcasts

  • Jango Radio - Free Internet radio, listen to hundreds of genre stations or create your own with your favorite music.

    • Notepads and Notebooks

  • Notepad - Offline capable Notepad PWA.

    • Privacy, Security and Cryptography

  • 10 Minute Mail - A temporary fully functional email address for 10 minutes (extendible).

    • Programming Editors and IDEs

  • Codepen.io - Playground for front end web development.

    • Programming Tools

  • CSS Minifier - Minifies CSS by removing whitespace and comments.
  • Website Speed Test | Pingdom - Feature-rich website tester.
  • Google Structured Data Testing Tool - Test a webpage for structured data and SEO.
  • Regulex - JavaScript regular expression visualizer.

    • Search Engines

  • Iconfinder - Download all your favourite icons in one place.
  • Emoji Search Online - Intelligent emoji search engine.
  • Google Fonts - Collection of open-source fonts by google.

    • Utilities (uncategorized)

  • TallTweets - Send tweets longer than 140 characters.

    • Miscellaneous

  • followupthen - Easiest way to setup email reminders.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Jun 4th, 2017
item.description:
Games

  • Spark Chess - Learn to play chess, play with users around the globe or play with AI depending on your skill level.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 31st, 2017
item.description:
Others

  • Browserpad - A server-less plain text editor in the browser. Allows you to open and save plain text files.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 30th, 2017
item.description:
Utilities (uncategorized)

  • TypingWeb - Master touch-typing with ease.

    • Programming Tools

  • CSS Typeset - Visual typeset editor. Play around with font-face, word-spacing and other text attributes and download the corresponding CSS.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 26th, 2017
item.description:
Text based tools

  • tYp3r - dA aNn0Y1Ng t3Xt g3NeRa7or (The annoying text generator :-P).

    • File Converters

  • favicon-generator - Generate favicons for your web-apps or icons for your Android or iOS apps by uploading your desired image.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 24th, 2017
item.description:
Audio and Video

  • bfxr - Make sound effects for your games.
  • MP3 Cut - Online audio cutter.
  • TwistedWeb Online - Powerful audio editor. Files not saved online.
  • Until AM - Online music mixer, DJ software.
  • VideoToolbox [Account] - Video editor with all the common editing features. Size limited to 600mb.

    • Business and Finance

  • ShapeShift.io - Instant cryptocurrency conversion.
  • Cryptrader.com - Cryptocurrency price charts and indicators. Saving your settings requires an account.
  • TradingView.com - Real-time information and market insights from various exchanges. Requires an account for saving settings.
  • InvoiceToMe - Generate professional invoices from various templates with your company details.

    • Latex

  • Papeeria - Latex preview with an option for downloading as a PDF available without registration.
  • Overleaf [Account] - Unlimited collaborators and projects, git access in the free account.
  • Sharelatex [Account] - Latex editor with unlimited private projects. 1 collaborator in free account.

    • Markdown

  • Dillinger - Powerful Markdown WYSIWYG with export to HTML and PDF. User account to save documents.
  • Github.md - Simple GitHub-style Markdown (GFM) preview with print feature.
  • Markdown Live Preview - Instant Markdown preview.
  • Markdownify - Minimal Markdown editor.

    • Others

  • EtherCalc - Online spreadsheet editor, exports to Excel.
  • PdfEscape - Edit or create PDFs in browser itself.

    • Games

  • Typeracer - Evaluate your typing speed while racing against others.

    • Graphics, Image and Design

  • Pixlr Editor - Image editor by Pixlr. Lots of features.
  • Photo Editor | Befunky - Image editor with lots of filters and effects.
  • Logo Makr - Logo maker with nice collection of SVGs. Requires payment to export logo as SVG (PNG is free).
  • Coolors - Color palettes generator.
  • Tiny PNG - Smart PNG and JPEG compression.
  • Realtime Board [Account] - Collaborative blackboard with huge area, screen sharing, video & voice communication.
  • Adobe Color CC - Color scheme designer.
  • Burner Bonanza [Account] - Tool to remove the background of an image and instantly share on Facebook or Twitter, login to download the edited image as PNG or JPEG.

    • Music, Radio and Podcasts

  • Podbay - Listen to any podcast online, individual episodes can be downloaded.
  • Internet Radio - Listen to over 40k radio stations.
  • Stitcher - Listen to podcast online.
  • AnyAudio - Stream and download music.
  • Muki - WebAudio-based chiptune & MIDI player, with a nice collection of video game music.
  • MusixHub - Play artists and albums video songs online, powered by YouTube.
  • plug.dj - Listen to thousands of DJs, powered by YouTube, sign-in required to become a DJ.
  • NoteFlight [Account] - Print music sheets, write your own music online (review).

    • Notepads and Notebooks

  • aNotepad - Saves your notes without a user account using cookies.
  • shrib - Save note to a custom URL and edit it later.
  • ProtectedText - Encrypted notes without ads, sessions, or cookies.

    • Programming Editors and IDEs

  • Ideone - Online IDE supporting most popular languages.
  • codepad - Online compiler which also allows you to create project (you get alloted a subdomain for your project). Note that there's no support for reading from stdin.
  • Repl.it - Online terminals for all popular programming languages.
  • Codechef IDE - Simple single file code compiler supporting major languages.
  • Cloud9 [Account] - Very powerful online dev environment, just like your local PC.
  • Codenvy [Account] - Cloud workspace for developers, supports most popular stacks including Android, Hadoop, Selenium, NodeJS and lots more.
  • SQLFiddle - Tool for easy online testing and sharing of database problems and their solutions.
  • Brainfuck Visualizer - Javascript Brainfuck Interpreter + Visualizer. Helps you understanding how code is working.

    • Programming Tools

  • UglifyJS JavaScript minifier - Minifies and obfuscates JavaScript.
  • HTML minifier by @kangax - HTML minifier. Minifies inline CSS and JavaScript too.
  • JavaScript compressor - JavaScript compressor and obfuscater.
  • Android Asset Studio - Android launcher icon, notification icon etc generator from existing images.
  • GTmetrix - Analyze your site’s speed and make it faster.
  • BuildWith - Find the technology stack to know everything about a website.
  • WooRank - SEO Audit tool, provides website review with global and local rank in terms of traffic generated.

    • Study and Education

  • Calculatoria Calculator - Scientific calculator online with progress stored on your system.
  • Desmos Graphing Calculator - Plot multiple 2D plots on same sheet, see graph intersections.
  • Geometry sheet by MathIsFun - Simple geometry sheet online if you want to play with figures.
  • Directed Graph Editor - Play with directed graphs.
  • Calcul - Collection of different calculators including matrix, unit converters, mathematical distributions and more.
  • Word Safety - Check if words are abusive in any languages.
  • OEIS® - The On-Line Encyclopedia of Integer Sequences®, helps in cryptography as well as formulating odd looking sequences.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Utilities (uncategorized)

  • Krutidev <--> Unicode - Convert Krutidev to Unicode (Mangal) and vice versa in one click.
  • Image Metadata Viewer - View hidden data (metadata) of any image.
  • Web-Capture - Webapp for converting webpages to popular formats (PDF, JPEG, ZIP) just by submitting link.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Communication

  • Tlk.io - Create a room with any URL (eg tlk.io/some-room) you wish and chat in groups.
  • Gruveo - Video conference online. Just like Tlk.io, easy to remember custom URLs.

    • File Converters

  • OnlineOCR - Convert a scanned PDF into DOC, XLS or TXT.
  • GifDeck - Convert slides from slideshare to GIF.

    • Text based tools

  • Diff Checker - Compare two text passages and view differences.

    • Miscellaneous

  • is.gd - Link shortener with custom URLs and open API (no tokens).
  • Bitly - Powerful URL shortener with REST API.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 21st, 2017
item.description:
Privacy, Security and Cryptography

  • scr.im - Share e-mail address freely without worrying about spam.

    • Utilities (uncategorized)

  • Postify [Account] - Schedule posts on Facebook, Twitter & LinkedIn.

    • Miscellaneous

  • IFTTT [Account] - Create a connection between your favourite online services. For example, if one needs to tweet their instagrams as native photos on twitter then IFTTT can come in handy.

    • Search Engines

  • ChooseMyPC - Search for the best combination of parts considering your requirements for your PC under a given budget.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 15th, 2017
item.description:
Utilities (uncategorized)

  • Acronym Creator - Create acronym for organization, algorithm, or anything having at least two words.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 8th, 2017
item.description:
Utilities (uncategorized)

  • WhoIsHostingThis - Find the web host of any website.

    • Drawing

  • bubbl - Create mind-maps, brainstorm ideas in the browser.

    • Communication

  • FaxZero - Send an online fax for free.

    • Miscellaneous

  • lmgtfy - When your friends are too lazy to use Google on their own.

    • Text based tools

  • Wordle - A toy to generate 'Word Clouds' form a given piece of text.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 7th, 2017
item.description:
Search Engines

  • Similar Sites - Find websites similar to the one you enter.
  • IWantMyName - Helps you search domains across all TLDs.

    • Text based tools

  • PolishMyWriting - Paste a text and get feedback on your writing.

    • Utilities (uncategorized)

  • WhatTheFont - Determine font name from an image.

    • Drawing

  • kleki - MS Paint like interface in browser.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 6th, 2017
item.description:
Privacy, Security and Cryptography

  • jotti - Scan any suspicious file or email attachment for viruses.

    • Utilities (uncategorized)

  • PrintWhatYouLike - Print any webpage or save it as HTML or PDF.

    • Search Engines

  • RSS Feed Search - Find RSS feeds from search terms.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps May 2nd, 2017
item.description:
File Hosting/Sharing

  • MultCloud - Cloud service to manage, move, copy and migrate data between multiple cloud services. Supports all major cloud services. No sign-up required, 2TB cloud storage, download large files directly to the cloud, no size restrictions.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Apr 29th, 2017
item.description:
Drawing

  • SVG-Edit - Powerful SVG editor with lots of features. Open source.
  • Method Draw - Clean and feature-rich SVG editor. Exports to PNG.
  • Draw.io - Flowchart and UML drawing tool. Lots of drawing styles available. Exports to PNG and integrates with Google Drive.
  • AutoDraw - Draw beautiful sketches, thanks to Google's Machine Learning. Drawings can be downloaded as PNG.

    • Utilities (uncategorized)

  • RANDOM.ORG - Random number generator, dice rolls, password generator, random bitmaps and more stuff based on the concept of randomness.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Apr 28th, 2017
item.description:
Utilities (uncategorized)

  • E.gg Timer - Simple countdown timer application.
  • QR Code Generator - Different types of QR codes like contact info, WiFi, calendar etc supported.

    • Text based tools

  • CopyPasteCharacter - Copy special characters that are generally unavailable in a keyboard.

    • Miscellaneous

  • isup.me - Check if website is unavailable just for you or everyone else.
  • Dictation.io - Online voice dictation software supporting large number of languages.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Apr 1st, 2017
item.description:
Drawing

  • A Web Whiteboard - Touch-friendly online collaborative whiteboard app.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Feb 20th, 2017
item.description:
Internet Downloaders

  • keepvid - YouTube, SoundCloud, Facebook downloader.
  • Seedr [Account] - Cloud based torrent downloader. Limited to multiple torrents of total size of 2gb in free account. Unlimited bandwidth. 500mb increase on contributing a new user.
  • savefrom.net - Download from YouTube, Dailymotion, Vimeo and more.
  • Youtube Converter & Downloader - Download YouTube video in any audio/video format.

    • File Converters

  • Online Convert - Collection of audio, video, image, document, ebook and archive converter. No file size limits and direct download links upon conversion.
  • Cloud Convert - Convert from anything to anything including audio, video, font, document and lots more. Excellent integration with cloud storage services like Google Drive and Dropbox. Direct links.
  • PDF <=> EPUB - PDF to EPUB converter and vice versa.
  • Pandoc Try - Inter markup conversion using Pandoc. Supported - Latex, Markdown, HTML, RST and lots more.
  • Print Friendly - Convert any webpage to simple format. Then download it or print as PDF.

    • Communication

  • Discord - Voice and text conference online. Username is asked at start to create a temp avatar.
  • Videolink2 - Video conference online. Link generated, share link to invite other participants.
  • GetARoom.io - Video conference online. Has mobile browser support, just click start new call and share the link.

    • File Hosting/Sharing

  • EFShare - Peer to peer secure file sharing.
  • Ge.tt - File hosting service. Max limit 2gb.
  • RGhost - File hosting service, Max limit 100mb without login.
  • ImgSafe - Image hosting service with small direct links.
  • Clyp - Audio sharing without limits, rich API.
  • SendVid - Video hosting service.
  • Archive.org [Account] - Unlimited file hosting of any type, no limits on bandwidth and upload size.

    • Privacy, Security and Cryptography

  • Encipher.it - AES-256 text encryption and decryption.
  • Encrypted Pastebin - Defuse.ca - Set password on your public pastes.

    • Miscellaneous

  • rollApp [Account] - Run desktop applications on any device.
  • Superbetize - Categorize your grocery list.

item.title: aviaryan/awesome-no-login-web-apps Dec 10th, 2016
item.description:
Some pointers

  • The web apps linked in this list provide most of their core features without login. Some websites that require registration have also been included in this list because of lack of a proper alternative. They have been tagged with [Account] in their listing.
